heading_content_part: 1st Generation PortalFor cameras and other devices which use the old mydlink Lite app (model numbers ending in L)

2nd Generation PortalFor cameras which use the new mydlink app (model numbers ending in LH)You can switch between these portals later by clicking "CHANGE PORTAL" from the menu at the top of the screen.
